title: BarDisplacement
description: BarDisplacement: Resulting total displacements in global coordinates along the bar.

UX.description: Total displacement along the global X-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UY.description: Total displacement along the global Y-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZ.description: Total displacement along the global Z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RX.description: Total rotation about the global X-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RY.description: Total rotation about the global Y-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZ.description: Total rotation about the global Z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
